emails.subject: TW
emails.body: TW Should we respond to PNM's protest of the dollar valuation of imbalances prior to netting and trading? Did we already respond to this issue when they filed their protest of the 637 filing? DF

emails.subject: TW
emails.body: TW Should we respond to PNM's protest of the dollar valuation of imbalances prior to netting and trading? Did we already respond to this issue when they filed their protest of the 637 filing? DF

emails.subject: TW

emails.subject: Re: TW
emails.body: Since PNM is the only party taking issue here, we might do a quickie answer clarifying the transportation and fuel language. This might enable us to get the type of netting and trading we want vs. volumes) for both shipper and operator imbalances at least until the GISB standards of netting and trading are approved. Maria From: Drew Fossum 12/06/2000 09:27 AM
